title: Lesson 56
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.example: I study English for thirty minutes every day.

words.meaning: to get, carry, or use something
words.example: Take an umbrella because it may rain.
My aunt will teach me how to cook.

words.meaning: to use your mind to consider something
words.example: I think this answer is correct.

words.meaning: to make an effort to do something
words.example: Try this soup and tell me what you think.

words.meaning: to move in a different direction or change position
words.example: Turn left at the next corner.

words.meaning: to do something with a tool, method, or object
words.example: Use a pencil for this form.

words.meaning: to move on foot at a normal speed
words.example: I walk to school every morning.
